text.message: you can be the road guy
I can do a no contest on 5-10 if you would be willing to give NB and promise to never plow to 9 wheat 3:1. Thoughts?
i prefer it not to be blocked
depends who can get the prots quickly
got to shut down that early sheep
my games hard with no wheat
not sure i would be able to compete army
red, why didn't you place on 3 wheat?
somobedy like black could have gone 8/10
and ore should have some decent trade value
that would have been better for you
sory red, black had no cards
happened to be the right block anyway
nice of you to not block him
probably doesn't matter what you block black
Thought I was the rob or didn’t believe me?
You thought you were the rob?
No, blue I’m asking if you thought I was the rob or you thought I was lying about wheat
you're starting to compete for army
Okay, so you thought I was rob. All good just curious
Im still building to 10. I don’t get road or army. I need most production to have a chance
Blue might have city for 7 and uncontested road. I’m plundered on 5
wild to not block blue at all, green
I’m at 6. How many do you think they have?
You can rob red. And you could also be on 9
What do you all want from me lol, I’ve soloed all game. I shouldn’t even have army 😅
u want me to not rob u?
